settings.text:
At Neoglyn, we prioritize getting your Anti-Gravity device to you securely and swiftly. We partner exclusively with Teamdrop to ensure a premium, fully-tracked fulfillment experience.

Processing Times

All orders are processed within 1-2 business days. Orders are not shipped or delivered on weekends or holidays.

Shipping Rates & Delivery Estimates

We offer Free Insured Shipping on all domestic device orders. Delivery typically takes 3-5 business days.

Order Tracking

Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number via email so you can monitor your delivery through our Teamdrop portal.
